title: Command Menu Item
description: Interface defining the structure of a command menu item used in command components and other menu-related components.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the command menu item.

props.name: text
props.description: Display text for the command menu item.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon class for the command menu item.

props.name: href
props.description: Optional URL or route for the command menu item.

props.name: children
props.description: Optional array of child command menu items for hierarchical menus.

props.name: index
props.description: Optional index for ordering command menu items.
